name: Real Estate 7-Touch Cold Nurture Email Only

nodes.name: Auto-Trigger (future — wire to Token Check when ready)

parameters.jsCode:
const body = $input.first().json.body;

const property_address = [
  body.property_street,
  body.property_city,
  `${body.property_state || ''} ${body.property_zip || ''}`.trim(),
].filter(Boolean).join(', ') || body.property_address || '';

return [{
  json: {
    lead_name:        body.lead_name        || '',
    phone:            body.phone            || '',
    email:            body.email            || '',
    source:           body.source           || '',
    lead_message:     body.lead_message     || '',
    property_street:  body.property_street  || '',
    property_city:    body.property_city    || '',
    property_state:   body.property_state   || '',
    property_zip:     body.property_zip     || '',
    property_address,
    price_range:      body.price_range      || '',
    beds:             body.beds             || '',
    baths:            body.baths            || '',
    agent_name:       body.agent_name       || '',
    agent_email:      body.agent_email      || '',
    agent_phone:      body.agent_phone      || '',
    has_email:        (body.email || '').trim().length > 0,
  }
}];

parameters.query: UPDATE leads SET nurture_enrolled_at = now(), updated_at = now() WHERE email = '{{ $json.email }}' AND nurture_enrolled_at IS NULL

assignments.name: prompt
